visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A middle-aged man with glasses and a gray newsboy cap greets the camera in a bright, modern technology exhibition space. He gestures enthusiastically with his right hand towards the camera and the surroundings. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up of a wall display showcasing a timeline of Samsung foldable phones. The man's hand is seen holding an original Galaxy Fold while standing in front of a white framed sign that says 'The first Galaxy Fold' and '2019'. (3) A sequence of shots showing various Galaxy Z Fold models, from Fold 2 to Fold 7, mounted vertically on the white exhibition wall. Each device is neatly displayed on a shelf with its name printed clearly underneath. The camera pans along the row of devices. (4) The camera provides a wider view of the entire 'Galaxy' history wall, revealing a large-scale display with years like '2019' and '2020s' marking different product eras. Multiple foldable and flip phones are visible in a structured grid. (5) The focus shifts to the Galaxy Z Flip series. Close-up shots compare the small cover screen of the 2020 Z Flip model to the increasingly larger external screens of the Flip 4, 5, 6, and finally the nearly full-surface external screen of the Flip 7.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 大家好. [Logo]: 3c 有意思 tim哥, @3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 我們來帶大家看一下啊. (3) [Subtitle]: Galaxy Fold 進化史還有 Flip 演化史. (4) [Subtitle]: 趕快來看. (5) [Subtitle]: 來第一代的 Galaxy Fold. (6) [Subtitle]: 你看我也有. (7) [Subtitle]: 這是 Galaxy Z Fold 2. (8) [Subtitle]: 這是 3. (9) [Subtitle]: 這是 4. (10) [Subtitle]: 這個是 5. (11) [Subtitle]: 6. (12) [Subtitle]: 7 沒錯. (13) [Subtitle]: 全員到齊. (14) [Subtitle]: 再看下 Galaxy Z Flip. (15) [Subtitle]: 2020 年. (16) [Subtitle]: 你看當時外螢幕多小啊. (17) [Subtitle]: 好我們再來看一下. (18) [Subtitle]: 這個是 Z Flip 4. (19) [Subtitle]: 你看螢幕喔. (20) [Subtitle]: 螢幕變大史. (21) [Subtitle]: 5, 6. (22) [Subtitle]: 最後. (23) [Subtitle]: 全螢幕了. [Slogan]: Galaxy Z Fold7, Galaxy Z Fold6, Galaxy Z Flip7.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator presenting the products.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A middle-aged man wearing glasses, a gray newsboy cap, and a white t-shirt with a camera strap visible.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A clean, white exhibition wall with Samsung Galaxy branding, product shelves, and chronological text labels.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male voice greetings the audience with a welcoming tone. The background is filled with upbeat, electronic synth music featuring a clear, driving percussion rhythm. The acoustics are clean with minimal room reflection. (2) Vocal delivery transitions into a descriptive mode, identifying the products. A crisp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates the transition between camera movements, matching the visual switch to the wall display. (3) The speaker begins a rhythmic count from 'one' to 'seven', with each model number spoken with emphasis and a slightly rising pitch. The BGM remains consistent in tempo and volume. (4) The speaker provides continuous narration over a wide-shot sequence. Faint environmental murmurs typical of an exhibition space are present but kept well below the primary vocal and music track. (5) Final phase features a shift in vocal quality towards excitement as the speaker describes the 'full screen' evolution of the Flip series. The audio concludes with a sharp cut-off of both music and voice.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase the chronological design evolution of Samsung's Galaxy Z Fold and Flip series, highlighting the technological advancements in screen size and form factor.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator is physically present at a Samsung-branded event, holding and pointing at Samsung devices while detailing their history and features.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly standardized tech-vlog style video with clear, high-contrast visuals and rapid-fire editing designed for social media consumption.
